# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.

Write secure code.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-application
  namespace: production
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-application
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-application
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web-app
        image: yourregistry/web-app:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "1000m"
        env:
        - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
          value: memcached-service

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
  namespace: production
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: memcached
        image: memcached:1.6.9
        ports:
        - containerPort: 11211
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "64Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "500m"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 11211
    targetPort: 11211
  selector:
    app: memcached
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-workers
  namespace: production
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-workers
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: background-workers
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: worker
        image: yourregistry/worker:latest
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        env:
        - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
          value: memcached-service
